title: Minecraft Bedrock Water Settings 1.26.0
description: Water settings for Vibrant Visuals. Defines particle concentrations, waves, caustics, and biome water color contribution for water rendering.

format_version.description: The 3-part schema version for parsing these water settings.

minecraft:water_settings.description: The root object containing water rendering settings.

description.description: Metadata that identifies these water settings.

identifier.description: The identifier for these water settings. The identifier must include a namespace.

particle_concentrations.description: Particle concentration values that determine water color and light behavior.

cdom.description: Concentration of chromophoric dissolved organic matter (CDOM) in mg/L. Higher concentrations produce yellow to yellow-brown colors. Range [0.0, 15.0].

chlorophyll.description: Concentration of chlorophyll in mg/L. Higher concentrations produce green colors. Range [0.0, 10.0].

suspended_sediment.description: Concentration of suspended sediment in mg/L. Higher concentrations produce red to red-brown colors. Range [0.0, 300.0].

waves.description: Wave settings for the water surface.

enabled.description: Whether or not waves are enabled.

depth.description: Controls the amount of wave displacement. Range [0.0, 3.0].

direction_increment.description: Controls how much the heading changes between each octave, in degrees. Range [0.0, 360.0].

frequency.description: Controls the size of individual waves. Higher values create more tightly packed waves. Range [0.01, 3.0].

frequency_scaling.description: Controls how much frequencies change in subsequent octaves. Range [0.0, 2.0].

mix.description: Controls how much each octave blends into the neighboring octave. Range [0.0, 1.0].

octaves.description: Determines how many layers of waves to simulate. Higher values result in more complex waves. Range [1, 30].

pull.description: Controls how much smaller waves are pulled into larger ones. Range [-1.0, 1.0].

sampleWidth.description: Controls the resolution of the fractal effect. Higher values result in smoother waves. Range [0.01, 1.0].

shape.description: Adjusts the shape of the wave. A value of 1 results in a pure sine wave. Range [1.0, 10.0].

speed.description: Controls the starting speed of the first waves. Range [0.01, 10.0].

speed_scaling.description: Controls how much faster or slower subsequent octaves move. Range [0.0, 2.0].

caustics.description: Caustics settings for projecting light rays on underwater surfaces.

enabled.description: Whether or not caustics are rendered. If false, all other caustics parameters are ignored. Defaults to true.

frame_length.description: How many seconds to spend on each frame of animation in the caustics texture. Range [0.01, 5.0].

power.description: Controls how bright the caustics effect appears. Range [1, 6].

scale.description: Controls the size of the repetition of the caustics texture. Larger values make the texture appear smaller. Range [0.1, 5.0].

texture.description: Resource location to a texture for controlling the shape of the caustics. If not supplied, a built-in texture is used automatically.

biome_water_color_contribution.description: Controls the contribution of surface_color water colors defined in *.client_biome.json files. A value of 0 results in no contribution, while a value of 1 results in maximum contribution. Range [0.0, 1.0].
